

# Organisations linked to problem passports

> **Note:** This listing is based on an extract of the EU's [List of known fantasy and camouflage passports](https://home-affairs.ec.europa.eu/list-known-fantasy-and-camouflage-passports_en) (October 2025).

| Organisation/document name | Original list entry with notes | EU Category | EU category description | Etymology classification by Repo | Notes | Sources |
